name: MnemoPay
description: Persistent cognitive memory, micropayments, and fraud-aware trust scoring for AI agents

tools.name: remember
tools.description: Store a memory with auto-scored importance. Tags enable filtered recall.

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Semantic search over memories. Ranked by importance x recency x frequency.

tools.name: reinforce
tools.description: Boost memory importance after a positive outcome (+0.01 to +0.5).

tools.name: consolidate
tools.description: Prune stale memories below decay threshold.

tools.name: charge
tools.description: Create escrow. Fraud-checked. Max amount = $500 x reputation.

tools.name: settle
tools.description: Finalize transaction. Boosts reputation +0.01 and reinforces recent memories +0.05.

tools.name: balance
tools.description: Check agent wallet balance and reputation score.

tools.name: profile
tools.description: Full agent profile: reputation, wallet, memory count, transaction count.

tools.name: reputation
tools.description: Detailed trust report: score, tier, settlement rate, total value settled.

tools.name: logs
tools.description: Immutable audit trail of all agent operations.

tools.name: history
tools.description: Transaction history with amounts, status, and timestamps.

resources.name: Agent Health
resources.description: Agent profile, wallet, and reputation as JSON

resources.name: Top Memories
resources.description: Top 20 memories ranked by composite score
